query:
-- TESTE 4: Dados Históricos e Futuros
-- 1. Contar vendas por ano
SELECT YEAR(createdAt) as ano, COUNT(*) as quantidade, SUM(saleValue) as valor_total
FROM sales
GROUP BY YEAR(createdAt)
ORDER BY ano DESC;

-- 2. Contar comissões por ano
SELECT YEAR(createdAt) as ano, COUNT(*) as quantidade, SUM(commissionValue) as valor_total
FROM commissions
GROUP BY YEAR(createdAt)
ORDER BY ano DESC;

-- 3. Vendas por mês em 2024
SELECT MONTH(createdAt) as mes, COUNT(*) as quantidade, SUM(saleValue) as valor_total
FROM sales
WHERE YEAR(createdAt) = 2024
GROUP BY MONTH(createdAt)
ORDER BY mes;

-- 4. Comissões por mês em 2024
SELECT MONTH(createdAt) as mes, COUNT(*) as quantidade, SUM(commissionValue) as valor_total
FROM commissions
WHERE YEAR(createdAt) = 2024
GROUP BY MONTH(createdAt)
ORDER BY mes;
